SEARCH
Package net.pl3x.guithium.api.json

Interface JsonSerializable

All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractElement, Button, Checkbox, Circle, Gradient, HelloPacket, Image, Keyed, LabeledRect, Line, Packet, Radio, Rect, Screen, Slider, Text, Textbox, Texture, Vec2, Vec4
public interface JsonSerializable
Represents an object that can be (de)serialized to/from JSON.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    static class 
    JsonSerializable.Adapter<T extends JsonSerializable>
    A custom JSON (de)serializer for the GSON library specifically for JsonSerializable objects.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final com.google.gson.Gson
    GSON
    Gson instance for (de)serializing objects to/from JSON.
